'''Yade M'rak''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] who settled in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] by [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. Addicted to [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] on the outcomes of [[Podracing/Legends|Podraces]], he lost the majority of his belongings to the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. M'rak remained in Mos Espa and took to [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] weapons on the [[Black market/Legends|black market]].

==Biography==
Yade M'rak was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].<ref name="ccg" /> By [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].</ref> he<ref name="ccg" /> moved to the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] world of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and settled in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]]. Largely ignored and derided by the city's [[Gangster/Legends|gangsters]] and [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]], M'rak made considerable efforts to stay out of their disputes and [[lightfight]]s.<ref name="Visual Dictionary">''[[Star Wars: Episode I: The Visual Dictionary]]''</ref>

On Tatooine, M'rak was addicted to [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] on the outcome of [[Podracing/Legends|Podraces]]. After losing most of his belongings to the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], he remained in Mos Espa and worked as a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] of [[Black market/Legends|black market]] weaponry.<ref name="ccg" /> In 32 BBY,<ref name="NEC" /> the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] attended the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|annual]] [[Boonta Eve Classic (32 BBY)/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] Podrace in the [[Mos Espa Grand Arena/Legends|Mos Espa Grand Arena]], where he watched the proceedings from the private viewing box of the [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] [[Watto/Legends|Watto]].<ref name="The Phantom Menace">{{Film|I}}</ref>

==Personality and traits==
Yade M'rak was a gambler who was addicted to betting on Podracing, but bad luck saw him part with the majority of his possessions.<ref name="ccg" /> He kept a low profile in Mos Espa and attempted not to become involved in local disputes.<ref name="Visual Dictionary" /> Like many other down-on-their-luck denizens of the city, M'rak scraped by while dreaming of one day being able to leave Tatooine.<ref name="Expanded Visual Dictionary">''[[Star Wars: The Phantom Menace: The Expanded Visual Dictionary]]''</ref> A smuggler of black market contraband, he was possessed of fair skin, as well as [[Color/Legends|gray]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] that he wore in at least two dreadlocks and sometimes kept under a hood.<ref name="ccg" />

==Behind the scenes==
Yade M'rak first appeared in the [[1999]]<ref name="Year">''[[Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle]]''</ref> [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. He was played by an uncredited actor.<ref name="The Phantom Menace" /> The character was first identified in the [[2001]] ''[[Coruscant Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="ccg" />
